Finding: 3 loan files missing updated Aadhaar copies. KYC not re-verified post address change.
Recommendation: Immediate re-KYC for affected accounts. Strengthen address change trigger.
Management_Response: Accepted. Re-KYC initiated.

Finding: Physical files not arranged chronologically. 5 files missing valuation reports in hard copy.
Recommendation: Implement digital checklist verification before file closure.
Management_Response: Accepted. Digital checklist rolled out.

Finding: 2 cases with LTV exceeding 80% without documented deviation approval in file.
Recommendation: Post-facto deviation approval to be obtained immediately. Process control strengthened.
Management_Response: Escalated to Credit Head. Deviation memos being prepared.

Finding: 1 NRI file missing FEMA compliance declaration. Power of Attorney not independently verified.
Recommendation: Obtain FEMA declaration. POA verification through Indian consulate.
Management_Response: Accepted. Documents requested from customer.

Finding: 3 accounts found with manually overridden rates without documented approval.
Recommendation: System controls to prevent manual rate override. Approval trail mandatory.
Management_Response: IT team notified. System change in UAT.

Finding: Sanction letters missing mandatory HDFC Bank merger disclaimer text.
Recommendation: Updated template to be deployed. Existing letters to be supplemented.
Management_Response: Template updated. Supplementary letters being sent.

Finding: Suspicious transaction report not filed for cash deposit of INR 12L against loan account within 30-day window.
Recommendation: Immediate STR filing with FIU-IND. Retrain branch staff on AML thresholds.
Management_Response: STR filed. Training scheduled for all branch staff.

Finding: Loans sanctioned for 4 units in project with lapsed RERA registration. No verification of RERA validity at sanction stage.
Recommendation: Mandatory RERA validity check to be added in pre-sanction checklist. System alert for RERA expiry.
Management_Response: Accepted. RERA validation API integration proposed.

Finding: Home insurance not obtained for 8 disbursed loans. Insurance disclosure missing from 12 sanction letters.
Recommendation: Ensure insurance procurement before disbursement. Update sanction letter template.
Management_Response: Insurance team engaged. Retrospective insurance being arranged.

Finding: NACH mandates not registered for 15 accounts within 30 days of disbursement. 6 mandates rejected by banks.
Recommendation: Track NACH registration as mandatory post-disbursement milestone. Escalation mechanism for rejections.
Management_Response: Process redesign underway. Dashboard being built for tracking.

Finding: Customer PAN and Aadhaar numbers visible in unencrypted email communications between branches.
Recommendation: Immediate cessation of sharing PII via email. Deploy encrypted document sharing portal.
Management_Response: Email DLP rules activated. Encrypted portal deployment in 2 weeks.

Finding: CIBIL scores not refreshed for 7 applicants where report was older than 90 days at sanction.
Recommendation: System to auto-reject stale CIBIL reports. Mandatory refresh before sanction approval.
Management_Response: System change request raised. Manual checks implemented as interim.

Finding: Same valuer used for both original and re-valuation in 3 high-value cases above 2 Cr.
Recommendation: Enforce different valuer for re-valuation through system control. Valuer rotation policy.
Management_Response: Accepted. Valuer allocation logic being updated in LOS.

Finding: Loan rejection reasons not communicated in writing to 22 applicants within stipulated timeframe.
Recommendation: Auto-generate rejection letters with reason codes. Track delivery through registered post/email.
Management_Response: System enhancement in progress. Manual letters sent for backlog.

Finding: DSA commission reconciliation not done for 3 months. 2 DSAs operating without renewed agreements.
Recommendation: Monthly DSA reconciliation mandatory. Agreement renewal tracker to be implemented.
Management_Response: DSA agreements renewed. Reconciliation backlog cleared.

Finding: Closed loan files older than 8 years found in branch storage. Retention policy not followed for digital archival.
Recommendation: Transfer old files to central archive. Digital scanning and archival for files crossing retention period.
Management_Response: Archival agency engaged. Scanning to be completed in 6 weeks.

Finding: CLSS subsidy applications for 9 eligible borrowers not filed within 3 months of disbursement.
Recommendation: Designate PMAY nodal officer per branch. Auto-flag eligible cases for subsidy filing.
Management_Response: Accepted. Nodal officers designated. Backlog claims filed.

Finding: Loan origination system password policy allows 4-character passwords. No MFA for credit officers.
Recommendation: Enforce minimum 12-character passwords with complexity. MFA mandatory for all LOS users.
Management_Response: IT team implementing MFA. Password policy update in next release.

Finding: Recovery agent training certification expired for 8 out of 25 deployed agents. No recent audit of agent conduct.
Recommendation: Suspend uncertified agents immediately. Quarterly conduct audit of all recovery agents.
Management_Response: Uncertified agents withdrawn. Re-training scheduled.

Finding: 47 customer complaints pending beyond 30-day resolution SLA. Escalation matrix not updated post-merger.
Recommendation: Clear complaint backlog within 2 weeks. Update escalation matrix with merged entity contacts.
Management_Response: Backlog clearance task force created. Escalation matrix updated.

Finding: Periodic KYC update not done for 35 high-risk customers due for review in Q3 2024.
Recommendation: Immediate outreach to high-risk customers for KYC refresh. Automated reminder system to be built.
Management_Response: Outreach initiated. 12 of 35 updated so far.

Finding: Cash transaction reports for 6 transactions above INR 10L not filed with FIU within prescribed timeline.
Recommendation: File CTRs immediately. Implement automated CTR generation from CBS.
Management_Response: CTRs filed retrospectively. CBS integration proposal submitted.

Finding: Top-up loan disbursed pushing combined LTV to 88% without fresh valuation or deviation approval.
Regulation_Reference: RBI Housing Loan Guidelines / NHB Guidelines
Recommendation: Mandatory fresh valuation for all top-up requests. Combined LTV check before top-up disbursal.
Management_Response: Fresh valuation ordered. Deviation approval obtained post-facto.

Finding: E-stamps not verified for authenticity on 4 property documents. Stamp duty verification not performed.
Regulation_Reference: Indian Stamp Act / State Stamp Acts
Recommendation: Integrate e-stamp verification API. Mandatory stamp duty verification in checklist.
Management_Response: API integration in progress. Manual checks as interim measure.

Finding: Pre-EMI interest calculation methodology not explained to 18 under-construction borrowers at disbursement.
Recommendation: Include pre-EMI calculation sheet as mandatory annexure to disbursement advice.
Management_Response: Template updated. Training given to disbursement team.

Finding: TDS certificates under Section 195 not issued to 5 NRI borrowers for interest deducted on deposits.
Recommendation: Automated TDS certificate generation for NRI accounts. Quarterly issuance compliance check.
Management_Response: System enhancement raised with IT. Manual certificates being issued.

Finding: Builder agreement template used for 3 projects not aligned with state RERA model agreement format.
Recommendation: Legal team to vet all builder agreements against state RERA model. Reject non-compliant templates.
Management_Response: Legal review initiated. 1 of 3 projects corrected.

Finding: Fire insurance sum insured less than outstanding principal in 11 cases. Policy renewal not tracked.
Recommendation: Annual insurance adequacy review. Automated renewal tracking and sum insured adequacy check.
Management_Response: Insurance review process redesigned. System alerts configured.

Finding: Income assessment for 5 self-employed borrowers based on ITR alone without GST return cross-verification.
Recommendation: Mandatory GST return verification for all self-employed applicants above 50L loan amount.
Management_Response: Process note updated. Training given to credit analysts.

Finding: Customer consent forms for data sharing with third parties not obtained for 28 digital loan applications.
Recommendation: Mandatory digital consent capture in loan application workflow. Retrospective consent for existing cases.
Management_Response: Consent module added to digital journey. Retrospective campaign launched.

Finding: Valuation reports for 6 properties do not contain mandatory photographs of all rooms and exteriors.
Recommendation: Valuation report template to mandate photo checklist. Auto-reject incomplete reports.
Management_Response: Valuer communication sent. Template updated.

Finding: Interest subsidy credit of INR 2.67L not passed to borrower account within 15 days of receipt from NHB.
Recommendation: Auto-credit mechanism for subsidy amounts. Daily reconciliation with NHB credits.
Management_Response: Credits passed within 48 hours. Reconciliation automated.

Finding: Floating rate reset communication not sent to 156 borrowers when repo rate changed in October 2024.
Recommendation: Automated rate change notification via SMS and email triggered by repo rate change.
Management_Response: System notification module built. Retrospective communications sent.

Finding: DSA found collecting processing fee directly from customers in 4 cases. Fee receipts not issued.
Regulation_Reference: RBI DSA Guidelines / Fair Practice Code
Recommendation: Terminate non-compliant DSA immediately. Refund processing fees to affected customers.
Management_Response: DSA terminated. Customer refunds processed. FIR filed.

Finding: Loan document repository accessible without role-based access control. Trainee IDs having full access.
Recommendation: Implement RBAC immediately. Quarterly access review for all LOS modules.
Management_Response: RBAC implementation completed. Access audit scheduled quarterly.

Finding:
Vendor due diligence not renewed for 3 BPO partners handling loan processing. SLA performance not monitored.,High,RBI Outsourcing Guidelines,Annual vendor due diligence mandatory. Monthly SLA review meetings with documented MoM.,Due diligence renewed for 2 vendors. Third under review.,Vendor Management Head,2025-03-01,In Progress
AF/2025/037,Panjim,2025-02-07,Grievance Redressal,Internal ombudsman contact details not displayed in 8 branches as required post-merger."
Recommendation: Display updated ombudsman details in all branches and on website within 1 week.
Management_Response: Signage ordered. Website update done.

Finding: Beneficial ownership declaration not obtained for 12 loan applications from companies/trusts.
Regulation_Reference: RBI KYC Master Direction 2016 / PMLA Rules
Recommendation: Mandatory beneficial ownership form in non-individual application pack. System-level block for incomplete KYC.
Management_Response: Form added to pack. System validation in next release.

Finding: Loan agreements stored in branch strong room found damaged due to water seepage. 34 files affected.
Recommendation: Immediate digitization of damaged files. Waterproofing of strong room. Insurance claim for damage.
Management_Response: Digitization underway. Facility team engaged for repairs.

Finding: Enhanced due diligence not performed for 3 PEP (Politically Exposed Person) linked loan accounts.
Regulation_Reference: PMLA Act 2002 / RBI KYC Master Direction
Recommendation: Immediate EDD for identified PEP accounts. PEP screening to be integrated with onboarding flow.
Management_Response: EDD completed for 2 accounts. Third under review. PEP database subscription activated.

Finding: Construction-linked disbursement made without architect certificate for 2 projects. Stage verification bypassed.
Recommendation: Architect certificate mandatory before each stage release. System block for missing certificate.
Management_Response: System change implemented. Retrospective certificates obtained.

Finding: MCLR to EBLR transition not completed for 23 legacy accounts. Customers not given option as per RBI directive.
Recommendation: Customer communication campaign for rate regime migration. System support for bulk transition.
Management_Response: Campaign launched. 15 of 23 migrated. Balance in progress.

Finding: NACH mandate amount not updated post rate revision for 42 accounts. EMI bounce risk identified.
Recommendation: Auto-trigger NACH amendment on EMI change. Customer notification for mandate update.
Management_Response: Process being automated. Manual updates done for high-risk accounts.

Finding: Debt-to-income ratio exceeding 60% in 7 cases without documented rationale in credit memo.
Recommendation: DTI threshold alerts in LOS. Mandatory justification for DTI above 50%.
Management_Response: System alerts being configured. Retrospective memos prepared.

Finding: Registration value used instead of market value for LTV calculation in 5 cases from Haryana.
Recommendation: Use higher of registration or market value for LTV. Valuation to be independent of registration value.
Management_Response: Valuer advisory issued. LTV recalculated for flagged cases.

Finding: Customer data shared with insurance partner without explicit opt-in consent in 15 cases.
Recommendation: Explicit consent capture before data sharing with any third party including insurance partners.
Management_Response: Consent mechanism added to insurance referral flow.

Finding: Title search reports older than 6 months accepted at disbursement stage for 4 properties.
Recommendation: Title search validity capped at 3 months. Fresh title clearance before disbursement for older reports.
Management_Response: Process note updated. Fresh title search ordered for flagged cases.

Finding: Overseas income documents not independently translated and certified for 3 NRI applicants.
Recommendation: Empaneled translator list to be maintained. Certified translation mandatory for non-English documents.
Management_Response: Translation arranged. Cost borne by bank as goodwill.

Finding: Pre-payment penalty charged on floating rate home loans in 7 cases in violation of RBI guidelines.
Regulation_Reference: RBI Fair Practice Code / NHB Guidelines
Recommendation: Immediate refund of penalty charged. System to block prepayment penalty on floating rate HL.
Management_Response: Refunds processed for all 7 cases. System updated.

Finding: API endpoint for loan status check found exposing customer PII without authentication in mobile app.
Regulation_Reference: RBI Cyber Security Framework / IT Act
Recommendation: Immediate API patching. Security audit of all customer-facing APIs.
Management_Response: API patched within 4 hours. Full API audit scheduled.

Finding: 5 DSA agents found to be simultaneously empaneled with competing HFCs without disclosure.
Recommendation: Annual DSA exclusivity and multi-empanelment disclosure. Conflict of interest policy enforcement.
Management_Response: Show-cause notices issued. Policy updated requiring annual declaration.

Finding: Outsourced data entry team processing loan documents without background verification completion.,High,RBI Outsourcing Guidelines / Data Protection Act,Background verification mandatory before system access.
